findings.message: mod.ts has 7 non-export/non-comment lines — barrels must be export-only
exported function 'stripToastFromUrl' uses non-standard prefix 'strip' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
exported function 'requireFreshUiContext' uses non-standard prefix 'require' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
README missing 10/12 mandated sections (Overview, Quickstart, Mental model, API, Recipes, Configuration, Testing, Observability, Architecture, Stability, Compatibility, License)
8 inline *_test.ts files outside tests/ — consolidate under tests/<layer>/
package owns runtime/adapters but does not import @netscript/logger
package owns runtime/adapters but does not import @netscript/telemetry — verify spans/metrics emitted
mod.ts does not export an `inspect<Noun>()` diagnostic — recommended discoverability axis
